prompt: I want to fuzz the input validation in /Users/dloffre/proj/claudit/sample-uaa. Create a standalone test harness for the ScimGroup creation logic so I can test it in isolation.

assertions.text: Creates a skeleton project directory structure for the harness
Uses claudit harness extract to pull functions from the project
Uses claudit harness analyze-deps to identify dependencies
Follows the iterative compile->stub/extract loop described in the skill
